q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is web.Response(text=template, content_type='text/html') which constructs an in-memory HTTP response object without network I/O, shell execution, or irreversible side effects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The tainted template is embedded in the returned web.Response object, so the unsanitized user input is inspectable on the returned value.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' with exprs ['_view']; the web.Response object is returned and its .text attribute holds the concatenated XSS payload.
